original_prompt: Advanced Custom Forms Refactor (Modal, UI Consistency & Extended Types)
rephrased_goal: Upgrade FormsView with modal overlay, extended field types (regex/email/tel), and refactor downstream views to support these new types.

subtasks_required: Overwrite file with provided modernized content
Verify FIELD_TYPES includes regex, email, tel
tasks.analogy_reference: swap old basket for big new shiny crate
tasks.testing_criteria: File contains modal-overlay logic and regex pattern input.
Modal overlay classes and extended types are present.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Check and patch view.users.js for custom fields
tasks.analogy_reference: teach users how to hold new stone tools
tasks.testing_criteria: Input type='email' or tel or pattern attribute injected.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Check and patch view.vans.js for custom fields
tasks.testing_criteria: Regex validation support in van form.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Check and patch view.items.js for custom fields
tasks.testing_criteria: Regex validation support in item form.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Check and patch view.appointments.js for custom fields
tasks.testing_criteria: Regex validation support in appointment form.

subtasks_required: Verify all forms views follow same UI pattern
tasks.testing_criteria: App builds, forms system logic uniform across all views.
